programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Under the Influence

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Wanna-Be Gangster
programme.desc: The police are searching for Anthony 'Tony' Burroughs, who shot a man to death and then escaped to the Philippines. William Jordan escaped from prison after being convicted, along with his friend Ted Anthony Prevatte, for the murder of James Rouse.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Murder in the Mountains
programme.desc: After leaving her husband Shane Miller, Sandy eventually returns home with their two daughters. Days later, a 911 call brings police to the home where they discover the murdered bodies of Sandy and the kids with Shane nowhere to be found.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Deceived to Death
programme.desc: A man's estranged wife hires a man to beat her husband to death. Then, a serial molester in Oregon abducts two women at knifepoint.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
programme.desc: The stories of a serial rapist in Nebraska and two brothers of 'The LA Boyz' gang thought to be in hiding in Mexico.

programme.title: Stand Up For Heroes

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Expedition X: Round-Up at Death Ranch
programme.desc: Bizarre cattle mutations in the Pacific Northwest lead Josh Gates to send his team to investigate. The baffling deaths make Jessica and Phil question if the cattle were victims of newly arrived apex predators or the target of something more sinister.

programme.desc: Two treasure hunters examine their most stunning find: the Black Obsidian Chalice. Together, they investigate the treasure's mysterious origins, decode its strange markings and reveal the secret ceremonies where it may have once been used.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Jean Lafitte
programme.desc: Josh ventures to the American south to uncover the mystery of real-life buccaneer Jean Laffite and the location of his hidden treasure.

programme.desc: Two treasure hunters examine their most stunning find: the Black Obsidian Chalice. Together, they investigate the treasure's mysterious origins, decode its strange markings and reveal the secret ceremonies where it may have once been used.

programme.desc: A pit crew from the movie 'Talladega Nights' brings out Cindy's inner redneck.

programme.desc: A seller claims he has President Thomas Jefferson's desk and Jon tries his luck with an antique horse racing game.

programme.desc: A seller brings in buckets filled with sterling silver and a father and son consign a seaman's locker.

programme.desc: A signed Evel Knievel cape and photos jump onto the auction block, along with a vintage phone booth.

programme.desc: In the Bahamas two fans face relentless insects and aggressive sharks during hurricane season.

programme.title: 600 Pound Mom: Race Against Time

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Nikki's Story
programme.desc: Lifelong secret eater Nikki finds her life and career as a costume designer threatened by immobility as her weight climbs to 650 pounds. In urgent need of drastic weight loss, she undergoes gastric bypass and confronts the emotional causes for her eating.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Milla's Story
programme.desc: At 700 lbs., Milla is bedridden and dependent on her husband and five kids. Terrified that each day will be her last, they still can't resist her unending requests for junk food.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Milla
programme.desc: For Milla, after three years and five surgeries, success would mean beating the odds, and becoming one of Dr. Nowzaradan's most impressive weight-loss patients, but failure would mean slipping back to the bedbound life she swore she'd never return to.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator Showdown
programme.desc: The wardens are deep into deer season, investigating a suspected poacher and a felon who shouldn't be using a firearm to hunt. An alligator and her hatchlings must be captured and relocated from a school.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens see plenty of violations at night, from road hunters to felons possessing firearms. Game Wardens stop wildlife crimes with anonymous tips about anglers keeping over the limit and a specially trained k-9 unit to sniff out illegal items.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Search for the Missing Link
programme.desc: Officer McKee handles a pesky bear in a school yard and on Mt. Washington a team searches for lost hikers. During a routine investigation, Canfield finds more than he bargained for, and an abandoned car is suspected to be linked to a missing persons case.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Still Hunting: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Frozen Over
programme.desc: Officer Hannett patrols for ice fishermen while Lt. Boudreau investigates a hunter who shot towards a road. Officer Holmes deals with a raccoon hiding in a warm chimney. And later, Officer St. Pierre goes on his first dive recovery under the ice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Poacher Pursuit
programme.desc: The conservation officers of New Hampshire are constantly on the watch for hunters illegally baiting wildlife and run into two separate cases of people taking illegal actions during deer and bear season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Outfoxed
programme.desc: The start of the busy tourist season has the wardens out in full force. A dangerous fox is on the loose in a crowded campground-the wardens need to find it fast. An ATV rider appears to have been partying too hard and nearly causes a wipe out.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail of Trouble
programme.desc: An ATV trail becomes the site of a high-speed chase when a man with an outstanding warrant attempts to flee from the Maine Warden Service. With the weather warming up, the wardens deal with intentional violators and serial offenders while enforcing laws.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hot on the Heels
programme.desc: The game wardens are on the lookout for over eager sportsmen trying to bend the rules as the season comes to close. One warden catches a Canadian posing as an American while others bring a fugitive to justice.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Takedown
programme.desc: As sportsmen arrive to take part in Maine's big game season, the wardens keep a watchful eye for night hunters and track down a deer poacher. Then, some hunters from out of state get a lesson in Maine's hunting laws.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Modern Treehouse
programme.desc: Equipped with a 205 ft zipline entrance through the trees, Pete and his team work modern magic in Georgia.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: View from Above IV
programme.desc: Taking a look back at builds from the past is always a joy for the crew. Pete and a few crew members gather around the campfire to poke fun at one another about the shenanigans they shared when building high up in the trees.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Alaskan Treetop Sauna
programme.desc: Pete creates an arboreal abode for an adventurous Alaskan couple that offers all the warm fuzzies they get from the outdoors without having to brave the bitter mountain cold.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Antonio Brown's Steel City Skybox
programme.desc: Pete makes a treehouse touchdown in Pittsburgh for Antonio Brown, wide receiver for the Steelers. The game plan is to build a luxury skybox with a two-storey window wall that overlooks a custom basketball court and football field.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Never Too Old for a Treehouse
programme.desc: Dreams are coming to life in Oregon as Pete builds for an exceptional client named Marlene, who at 81-years-young is finally getting one of her greatest wishes fulfilled: a treehouse. Marlene's giddy with excitement for this new adventure.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Bunny Beach Bungalow
programme.desc: Antonio meets a couple whose home has been taken over by their rescued bunnies. He'll transform their overgrown backyard into a beach-themed oasis for humans and bunnies, complete with predator-proof enclosures.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Pygmy Goat Playground
programme.desc: A family has two Nigerian dwarf goats who wreak havoc in their backyard. Enter designer Antonio, who transforms their space into the ultimate goat playground, complete with a climbing tower, observation deck, and an easy-to-clean three-story goat house.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Backyard Barnyard
programme.desc: A family has been crowded out by their rescued animals, including two mini horses that insist on sleeping in the master bedroom. Antonio's solution is to build the ultimate horse barn with all the modern comforts and attach it directly to the house.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Pot-bellied Pig Palace
programme.desc: Antonio meets a family and their pot-bellied pig who has turned their front yard into a dustbowl. Antonio goes hog wild and designs the ultimate piggy paradise with a new pig house, mud pit, space to run and an activity wall to keep Mr. Pickles happy.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Chinchilla Chill Pad
programme.desc: Antonio and his team design and build an elaborate system of tunnels and towers spanning two rooms for a family and their seven adorable, fluffy chinchillas.

programme.title: Movie: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: A lonely man meets a woman on the Internet who happens to be in prison. When she breaks out to be with him, she proceeds to wreak havoc on his middle-class life.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Witness Protection
programme.desc: A New York City banker puts his family into a witness protection program at his aunt's home when he is set up as the instigator of his company's fraudulent scheme.

programme.title: Snapped: Mandy Smith
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads police to his girlfriend and a host of secrets about their past.

programme.title: Snapped: Amber Smith
programme.desc: Amber finds her home ransacked, and the police find her fiancé dead in his bed. What at first seems like a home invasion gone wrong turns into a twisted situation, as melting snow reveals a clue.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawn Fowler
programme.desc: A church congregation is shocked when a deadly home invasion turns out to be part of a scandalous web of sex, lies and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Kimberly Ross
programme.desc: When a young father goes missing, authorities suspect his illegal activities, but a revelation about the mother of his children turns the investigation upside down.

programme.title: Snapped: Inside the Episode: Dee Eggert
programme.desc: Profiles of fascinating cases of women accused of murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Inside the Episode: Cynthia Mueller
programme.desc: Every story has behind-the-scenes facts, insights, and often jaw-dropping allegations that we wish we had time to share on television. Well, now we can. This special episode features details about these investigations never before seen on 'Snapped.'

programme.title: Snapped: Marissa Wright
programme.desc: A concerned father in Arkansas reports his son missing, launching an investigation that would unearth a dark network of lies and a horrific discovery more deadly than police ever imagined.

programme.title: Snapped: Denise Frei
programme.desc: The murder of a local café owner leads a small-town police force to uncover a diabolical scheme fueled by scandalous temptation.

programme.title: Snapped: Carri Standsoverbull
programme.desc: When a charred human torso is discovered on a Native American reservation in Montana, local and federal investigators join forces to piece together a heinous crime.

programme.title: Snapped: Stacey Shoeck
programme.desc: The murder of a devoted family man leads investigators through a twisted tale of infidelity, betrayal and one woman’s deadly plan.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County: Love Lost at Sea

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Wishing Well Hell
programme.desc: When the body of a beloved, elderly woman is found brutally murdered and stuffed inside a decorative wishing well in the backyard of her property, a dogged detective goes on a years-long hunt to catch her elusive killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Bread & Breakfast & Body
programme.desc: Investigators believe a young woman went missing on her own accord, but her mother is convinced that someone close to her is hiding a big secret. A two-year search for the truth brings investigators to the backyard of a historic location.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Murder House
programme.desc: While attempting to identify the remains of a victim found buried in the backyard of a plush California home, investigators uncover a mystery with an unsettling truth: another murder was committed at the exact same residence, thirty years earlier.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Killer by the Coast
programme.desc: When two female college students go missing, their whereabouts remain unknown for months, until a parole officer recalls startling information that would lead investigators to the backyard of a remote property.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Death in the Desert
programme.desc: After a homeowner randomly uncovers human remains while doing yard work in his California backyard, a homicide detective enlists the help of a local veterinarian to solve the murder.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Two Counties, Two Bodies
programme.desc: A concerned son asks investigators to help track down his missing father, ultimately sending them on a lengthy game of cat-and-mouse that results in horrific discoveries in two backyards.

programme.title: Snapped: Regina Williams
programme.desc: A case that could be a hit-and-run murder or an abused woman or woman scorned.

programme.title: Snapped: Shannon Baugus
programme.desc: A wife refuses to watch a Star Wars cartoon with her husband, so he strikes her, and she strikes back.

programme.title: Snapped: Rennie Pratt
programme.desc: An Oakland hairdresser claims her boyfriend's death is an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Snapped: Kara Lounsbury
programme.desc: When her wealthy father and stepmother are murdered, a Colorado woman tries to blame her brother.

programme.title: Snapped: Velma Ogden Whitehead
programme.desc: A deadly carjacking goes unsolved, until police trace the crime back to the victim’s wife and stepson.

programme.title: Snapped: Mia Gonzales
programme.desc: A quiet California cul-de-sac becomes a crime scene when a couple’s domestic drama reaches a deadly climax.

programme.title: Snapped: Donna Cobb
programme.desc: A brutal fight leaves a New York woman fighting for her life and her freedom.

programme.desc: After graduating from college, the members of the Barden Bellas reunite to put on one last show for American troops in Europe. Upon arriving, they discover that their competition uses musical instruments, something the acapella group has never faced.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A pregnant Sophie grows closer to her mother as she shares stories of how she came to live on a Greek island and how she met three handsome young men, any of whom could be Sophie's father, but an unexpected visit from Sophie's grandmother changes things.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.desc: When the Exxon Valdez oil tanker spills millions of gallons of crude oil at sea, it contaminates Alaska's pristine coastline and creates an apocalyptic environmental catastrophe; experts investigate what caused this horrific disaster.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: South to North Water Diversion
programme.desc: Engineers in China are constructing the largest and most ambitious water transfer project ever conducted as they attempt to defy nature and move vast quantities of water from the south to the dry north in Beijing, all without the use of pumping stations.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Navy's Super Submarine
programme.desc: The Virginia Class is one of the most advanced nuclear powered, fast attack submarines ever produced for the US Navy. These technological titans are almost 400 feet long, and weigh a staggering 7,800 tons.

programme.title: Disasters Engineered: Exxon Valdez Declassified
programme.desc: When the Exxon Valdez oil tanker spills millions of gallons of crude oil at sea, it contaminates Alaska's pristine coastline and creates an apocalyptic environmental catastrophe; experts investigate what caused this horrific disaster.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: South to North Water Diversion
programme.desc: Engineers in China are constructing the largest and most ambitious water transfer project ever conducted as they attempt to defy nature and move vast quantities of water from the south to the dry north in Beijing, all without the use of pumping stations.

programme.desc: The Virginia Class is one of the most advanced nuclear powered, fast attack submarines ever produced for the US Navy. These technological titans are almost 400 feet long, and weigh a staggering 7,800 tons.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: NASA footage and interviews with the astronauts and scientists reveal some of the strange cases NASA has encountered.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: Ghosts of the Deep: Black Sea Shipwrecks
programme.desc: The largest ocean archaeological expedition ever has discovered a fleet of ancient ships perfectly preserved in the Black Sea’s mysterious depths, and as experts investigate this holy grail of shipwrecks, they uncover hidden secrets and lost treasures.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a 14-year-old girl vanishes without a trace on her way to school. Her parents have no idea where she could be. Investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage, but are unsure if they will find her before its too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Night Shift
programme.desc: 18-year-old Kyle Farishian is working the late shift at a 7-Eleven on Halloween when he is brutally attacked by a masked assailant. With no physical evidence, detectives scrutinize the convenience store's surveillance footage for any clues.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Back of the Shed
programme.desc: A backyard shed in a Michigan trailer park holds the answers to a dark secret regarding a missing teenage couple. Police interview their families, but one member is evasive, deepening the mystery and setting off a covert manhunt across the Midwest.

programme.title: Atlanta Olympic Bombing: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: At the 1996 Olympics, a security guard discovers pipe bombs and clears the area to minimize fatalities. Praised as a hero, the FBI then decides he fits the profile of a domestic terrorist, while the real villain continues his terror campaign.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Alaskan Temptress
programme.desc: A Washington community is shocked when PTA mom, Mechele Linehan is arrested for murder from a decade earlier in Alaska. Details of a seedy and sordid past emerge. But is this suburban mother a cold-blooded temptress or has she been wrongly accused?

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Back of the Shed
programme.desc: A backyard shed in a Michigan trailer park holds the answers to a dark secret regarding a missing teenage couple. Police interview their families, but one member is evasive, deepening the mystery and setting off a covert manhunt across the Midwest.

programme.title: Atlanta Olympic Bombing: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: At the 1996 Olympics, a security guard discovers pipe bombs and clears the area to minimize fatalities. Praised as a hero, the FBI then decides he fits the profile of a domestic terrorist, while the real villain continues his terror campaign.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Tape the Scene
programme.desc: Agnes Bram, an 82-year-old Middleton, Wisconsin woman is found murdered in her garage. As detectives develop their case, a city-wide manhunt follows, and investigators are forced to curb public hysteria with the need to ensure he doesn't kill again.

programme.title: Dead of Night: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: A convenience store clerk working the graveyard shift is on edge after a string of grisly murders are committed within blocks of her store. Soon, her worst nightmare becomes reality when she comes face to face with a twisted and deranged serial killer.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Last Call
programme.desc: Two young mothers living hundreds of miles apart vanish under eerily similar circumstances. Years pass without a single lead in either case until a Missouri police officer's routine house call uncovers the most unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: The Girls of Belmont Ave
programme.desc: In the heart of Richmond, VA, a love triangle tears apart a group of gay girlfriends- and leads to brutal murder. Investigating this senseless and sadistic killing, detectives uncover a deadly plot fueled by lies, gossip, and a thirst for revenge.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Stick to the Plan
programme.desc: When a small-town girl is stabbed to death while housesitting, detectives must work to separate twisted fantasies from dead serious fact, in a case that blurs the line between movie horror and real-life murder.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Date with Dystiny
programme.desc: When firefighters extinguish a California brush fire, they unexpectedly ignite a twisted murder mystery- rife with forced prostitution, burning jealousy, and an almost unthinkable murder mastermind.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Unlucky Seven
programme.desc: Heather, a grocery store barista, has just began dating her most recent hire, Arturo. But as time goes by, Arturo is unable to hide his dark side. His obsession with Heather comes at the expense of their relationship, his job - and her life.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cornered
programme.desc: In the spring of 2003, 37 year old single mother Karen Richardt has a chance meeting with her Brooklyn neighbor Carlito Perez. But when Karen tries to distance herself, no one could have predicted the deadly cycle of violence he would unleash.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Going Postal
programme.desc: When US postal worker Kim accepts a ride to the Orange County fair from a quiet co-worker, she has no idea that she will become the center of a terrifying campaign of stalking, harassment, and obsession.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Dear Katherine, It's Me the Killer
programme.desc: When 18-year-old freshman Katherine Foster goes missing, terror strikes the heart of the University of South Alabama. Has she been abducted? Raped? Is there a killer in their midst? Rumors fly, as students fear the worst ... anyone could be next.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Death Takes a Toll
programme.desc: 39-year-old, Michael Zammitti, Jr., has it all: a loving family, a thriving business, and a comfortable home. But when that life is shattered, police must untangle a web of corruption and lies that will rock two small New England towns to their core.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Left For Dead
programme.desc: A mysterious call draws the Sheriff's Office in Orlando, Florida to a young artist's second floor apartment, where she's found brutally beaten. With few clues to investigate, can detectives uncover this shadow in the night before he strikes again?

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Master Key Murder
programme.desc: The charming town of Macon, GA panics when Mercer Law grad Lauren Giddings is murdered on campus. Detectives uncover multiple suspects with motive and means. But only one person in the group is sadistic enough to kill.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Century Ago
programme.desc: When Jennifer and Paul's home inspection report came back with only minor repairs, Paul tackled them with enthusiasm. It was not long before they began to suspect that the home inspector had missed some much bigger problems.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: After a contractor holds Laura and Greg's new kitchen hostage for four months, even threatening to put a lien on their home, the desperate couple turn to the one contractor they can trust.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations
programme.desc: Michael digs into an incredible one-of-a-kind creation: a deep-fried burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast
programme.desc: In Memphis, Michael Symon sits down with four generations of barbecue royalty for the scoop on their most delicious family secrets, with a side of smoked turkey and sweet potato fried pie.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Classics Gone Wild
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe crosses the country in search of carnival classics gone wild! From a pumped-up corndog at the Porter County Fair to an out of this world funnel cake-blooming onion mashup at the Greater Gulf State Fair.

programme.title: Thanksgiving Grubdown
programme.desc: Carla Hall discovers some Thanksgiving traditions with a twist and a cornucopia of outrageous Turkey Day treats. Gobble until you wobble on pumpkin pancakes piled high with a slice of cheesecake.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Easy as Pie
programme.desc: From an entire Thanksgiving dinner stuffed into a pie to the Texas-sized Pumpecapple, these friendly shops across America are finding many ways to fill a pie crust.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Howdy, Texas!
programme.desc: Chefs are kicking up the creativity with their big and bold flavours at these hot spots across the Lone Star state, from an Austin beer garden serving up the best of the wurst to sizzling fajitas topped with garlic butter at a Houston Tex-Mex joint.

programme.title: Food Paradise: The Brunch Bunch
programme.desc: It's Sunday Funday every day in Food Paradise so we're checking out the most extreme brunch spots in the United States! First, there's a doughnut burger that's bringing both sweet and savory to California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Rigs
programme.desc: Bill Rousseau transformed a retired Cessna airplane into a smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy Contraptions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes from the west coast to east coast to check out crazy contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heating It Up In Hawaii
programme.desc: Things are heating up in Hawaii which inspires Roger Mooking to do some island-hopping for the best eats. On Oahu, Hawaii, Roger and farmer Daniel Anthony heat up an imu, a traditional underground oven, for a feast of cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature
programme.desc: Noah tries his hand at making a deep fried root beer float and torches a berry brulee waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs

programme.desc: Sam and Dean’s routine case turns out to be anything but.

programme.title: Movie: Solo: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: Han Solo, a promising young pilot, gets swept up into the criminal underworld in a galaxy far, far away. Through a series of daring heists and escapes, he meets and forms lifelong bonds with the Wookiee Chewbacca and the smuggler Lando Calrissian.

programme.title: Movie: Solo: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: Han Solo, a promising young pilot, gets swept up into the criminal underworld in a galaxy far, far away. Through a series of daring heists and escapes, he meets and forms lifelong bonds with the Wookiee Chewbacca and the smuggler Lando Calrissian.

programme.title: Castle: Recoil
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a young woman, Castle and Beckett find evidence that links her death with Senator William H. Bracken, the man responsible for Beckett's mother's murder.

programme.title: Castle: Reality Star Struck
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett get an up-close-and-personal view of a 'Real Housewives'-esque reality TV series, 'The Wives of Wall Street,' when they investigate the murder of the show's rising young star.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: During a city-wide blackout that impedes law enforcement and emergency response teams, Pride vows to solve the murder of a family friend's fiancé.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Billy and the Kid
programme.desc: The murder of a marine provides new clues in the first case Pride and Lasalle ever worked together, just before Hurricane Katrina struck the city and washed away any evidence. Also, the team celebrates Thanksgiving together in Pride's bar.

programme.title: Charmed: The Courtship of Wyatt's Father
programme.desc: When Leo and Piper are sent to another plane, Phoebe and Paige mourn their deaths.

programme.title: Charmed: Hyde School Reunion
programme.desc: Phoebe casts a spell on herself that allows her wild teenage personality to take over.

programme.title: Charmed: Spin City
programme.desc: Chris is attacked by a spider demon and infected with a venom that alters his personality.

programme.title: Charmed: Crimes and Witch-Demeanors
programme.desc: The sisters go before a magic tribunal to save the life of Detective Morris.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Touched by the Sun
programme.desc: When a female combat pilot and navy hero dies in an air-show plane crash, the team must investigate if it's the fault of the pilot or the new jet that was just approved to deploy to bases globally.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: I Do
programme.desc: The team must determine why a murdered navy drone pilot was using a black market drone to obtain military surveillance and whether the drone's footage is linked to his death.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Foreign Affairs
programme.desc: Special Agent Pride is sent a partner from the Australian Defence Force Investigation Service, Special Agent Naomi Parsons, after an Australian Royal Navy lieutenant, who was key to international negotiations on nuclear weapons, is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Insane in the Membrane
programme.desc: The team's participation in the annual Red Dress Run is cut short when a Petty Officer is found dead in the French Quarter from a drug overdose.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Broken Hearted
programme.desc: The life of a genius navy coder employed by Brody's mother, Olivia, hangs in the balance after the heart intended for his transplant is stolen. Olivia joins the team as they race to locate the missing organ.

programme.title: Bones: The Hole in the Heart
programme.desc: When sniper-on-the-loose Jacob Broadsky claims another victim, Booth becomes more determined than ever to catch his elusive foe.

programme.title: Movie: Rudolph and Frosty's Christmas in July
programme.desc: Rudolph's magical glowing nose is not only helpful at Christmas but also in the heat of summer when Rudolph and his friend, Frosty the Snowman, are called in to rescue a struggling circus at a special July 4th benefit.

programme.title: Frosty's Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: In an effort to cure Frosty's loneliness, the kids decide to make him a wife, Crystal. But will Jack Frost let them be happy?

programme.title: Movie: Rudolph's Shiny New Year
programme.desc: Father Time asks Rudolph to find the next Baby New Year before midnight on New Year's Eve. Unless Happy returns in time to take his position as the New Year, the date will perpetually be December 31st.

programme.title: Movie: The Year Without a Santa Claus

programme.title: Movie: The Polar Express

programme.title: Movie: Scrooged

programme.desc: Will's love affair with a musician is threatened when she meets her handsome ex-lover.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Ol' Ball and Chain
programme.desc: On the day of Jazz's wedding, his bride-to-be makes sexual advances towards Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Will is stranded in a mountain forest with his new girlfriend's disagreeable father.

programme.title: Movie: Drumline
programme.desc: A gifted drummer from New York wins a full scholarship to a Southern University where he will lead the drum line.

programme.title: Movie: ATL
programme.desc: Friends face different challenges as they prepare for life after high school.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under Wraps
programme.desc: A woman loses her job and beau on the same day and reluctantly accepts a position in Alaska. When she gets the position she originally hoped for, she must choose between a life she's always wanted and her new life in Alaska.

programme.title: Movie: A Cheerful Christmas
programme.desc: As a 'Christmas Coach' a woman provides her clients with all the magic of the holidays. In order to make her new clients vision a success, she is tasked with working with their son, to find out all of their holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Vienna
programme.desc: Jess, a concert violinist who has lost her passion, visits Vienna for Christmas. There she finds the inspiration she has been missing with an American diplomat and his children.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Pemberley Manor
programme.desc: A rookie party planner works with a serious and all-business to put together a Christmas festival with help from a merrily enigmatic caretaker who looks like Santa. As the festival approaches, the spirit of the holidays may lead to a wish of love.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Love
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic who can't seem to give a guy a real chance begins receiving '12 Days of Christmas' gifts anonymously at door. She begins to believe that the mystery suitor could live up to her expectations.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream
programme.desc: A manager of a department store is determined to land a position in the new Paris location. She sets out to impress the store's owner by creating the best display in stores' history.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Detour
programme.desc: Two NYC-bound travellers find themselves linked when a storm waylays their flight to an airport hotel in Buffalo. Desperate to get home in time for Christmas, a woman seeks help, in any form, to make a Christmas miracle happen.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Wes Brown, Jessy Schram and Brooke D'Orsay stop by.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Mix-Up
programme.desc: A woman is headed to spend the holidays with her fiancé's family, but a mix up at the airport lands her at the wrong home. She quickly forms a bond with the 'wrong' family, especially the handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Christmas
programme.desc: A resort developer heads to Christmas, Colorado, to scope out a new piece of land. While away, she has a minor car accident and meets the towns handsome sheriff, who helps her have a Christmas to remember.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Finale
programme.desc: Months after the airing of the documentary, the workers of Dunder Mifflin, past and present, gather for a wedding and a final round of interviews.

programme.title: The Office: Pilot
programme.desc: Michael Scott decides not to tell his staff that the branch may be downsizing.

programme.title: The Office: Health Care
programme.desc: When Corporate wants Michael to pick a cheaper health plan for his employees, Michael shirks responsibility and Dwight happily accepts the task. Delighted with his new position of power, Dwight manages to offend everyone.

programme.title: The Office: The Alliance
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim form an alliance to protect themselves during the upcoming downsizing.

programme.title: The Office: Basketball
programme.desc: The office staff prepares for a game of basketball against the workers in the warehouse.

programme.title: The Office: Hot Girl
programme.desc: Michael believes he is going to 'score' when he gives an attractive woman a ride home.

programme.title: The Office: The Dundies
programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin employees suffer through the annual office awards ceremony, The Dundies, hosted by their pompous boss Michael Scott at their local watering hole.

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight are out of the office for the day as Michael tries to close a deal on a new condo for himself. Meanwhile, Jim and Pam organize an "Office Olympics" where the staff members compete in ridiculous games.

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight
programme.desc: After Dwight karate punches Michael, Jim organizes a lunchtime rematch at Dwight's dojo where Pam becomes annoyed when Jim gets too friendly with her.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Nov 19, 2020
programme.desc: News reports, trends, pop culture, sports and politics with an alternative point of view.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me

programme.title: South Park: Douche and Turd

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?

programme.title: Movie: Christmas 9 to 5
programme.desc: A young crime reporter goes undercover at a department store as a sales clerk from Black Friday to Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Date With the Devil
programme.desc: Recently-divorced mom Ingrid Lyne dips her toes back into the dating scene and meets a man online. But her date at a baseball game would be her last. The next day investigators are shocked by a chilling crime scene.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Killer Affair
programme.desc: Days after a pregnant elementary school teacher disappears, her boyfriend goes in front of TV cameras and tearfully pleads for her return. But investigators soon discover the grieving boyfriend may have had more than one reason to cry.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: After Dark: Mom's Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When Colorado soccer mom Paige Birgfeld suddenly vanishes, a small town is left on edge. As cops start to dig for clues, they make a shocking discovery, this devoted mom was living a secret double life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Million Dollar Death
programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Close Encounters
programme.desc: Two strangers are dropped in one of the most dangerous African locations in the dead heat of Summer. Faced with aggressive hippos and charging elephants they quickly learn their place, but must mark their territory if they want to make it twenty-one days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Ghosted
programme.desc: In a brutal Mexican jungle known to be haunted by Mayan spirits, All-star survivalists Sarah and Trent are tormented by rain, predators and spirits of the rainforest. Then, two strangers try to survive in the crosshairs of Africa's deadliest predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: Revealing incredible unseen footage as barenaked strangers struggle to survive 21 days in some of the cruellest environments on the planet. It's the fights, the pain and the tears we didn't see in the original episodes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Trying to Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Deep in Mexico's Baja desert lies the scorching wasteland of the Devil's Canyon. A Canadian mountain man teams up with an experienced homesteader to take on the canyon's triple-digit heat, scarce water, and venomous predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Couches and Kill Zones
programme.desc: A pair of superfans use knowledge they learned from their couches to take on the harsh elements deep in the Amazon rainforest. Meanwhile, a tribe of four struggles against constant threats in a dangerous African kill zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Shaken and Very Stirred
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake in the Philippine jungle rattles a thrill-seeking chef and a competitive hockey mom but lack of food and severe dehydration lead to a disastrous face-first fall. Later, two superfans are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Til Naked Do Us Part
programme.desc: Two survivalist couples discover love in the jungle.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Amazoned Out
programme.desc: Superfans Molly and Nate are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest, a place that's taken down the best of the best. Nate and Molly lean on lessons learned from their couches to push through torrential rain, relentless bugs, and extreme sleep deprivation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: White Water Roulette
programme.desc: In McKinley Creek, Fred and Dustin Hurt split up into two separate teams for a better chance at striking it rich. With new technique and ingenuity The Dakota boys finish their season with a record haul.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Come Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A late start to the season shortens their mining window and with record snowfall melt the crew faces the most dangerous conditions ever. Dustin picks up right where he left off at Rockfall Ravine, while Fred's future diving for gold lies in the balance.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Dirt: Tough Love
programme.desc: The Dirt is back with Parker, Rick, Tony and first-time mine boss, Fred Lewis. Parker lets loose on Fred's style, Rick explains why this will be his best year and Fred shows us a group of veterans that are like no mining team we've seen before.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Mr. and Mrs. Tickle's Big Bootleg
programme.desc: Tickle comes to the rescue after apprentice moonshiners Howard and Moe 'lose' a quarter of their run. But when the old friends embark on a risky bootleg operation, only newlywed and former bondswoman, Mrs. Tickle, can save them all from the law.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Narrow Escape
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy braves gators in the Florida night to snatch a party boy's Cessna Float plane. Kevin Lacy enrols a vengeful divorcé for a high-altitude, high-risk heist in Colorado and Ken and Danny have a close encounter with an angry debtor's shovel.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht and the debtor comes after them full-force. Mike devises a solution to get even with the deadbeat who bought his favourite plane and stopped paying. Kevin and Heather find themselves in the middle of a mid-air nightmare.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Repo
programme.desc: At one of the biggest aviation expos in the country, Ken and Danny track down a vintage Stearman biplane. Mike Kennedy helps an old pilot retrieve his stolen skywriting plane, and Kevin and Heather pose as tourists in order to attempt a rare mid-air repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: South of the Border
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy repos a chopper from the roof of a corporate high-rise. Kevin Lacey infiltrates a Mexican ranch to snatch a family plane stolen by a wayward brother. Ken and Danny find themselves up against a rival repo team.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Come Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A late start to the season shortens their mining window and with record snowfall melt the crew faces the most dangerous conditions ever. Dustin picks up right where he left off at Rockfall Ravine, while Fred's future diving for gold lies in the balance.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: In Her Own Hands
programme.desc: Ashley unknowingly conceives a child just two months after giving birth. One night, horrible cramps send her to the bathroom with an urge to push. She's shocked as she delivers a baby girl into her own hands, never aware she was even pregnant.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: The Wedding Gift
programme.desc: Jenna misses her period but a home pregnancy test is negative, so she thinks it's the stress of her upcoming wedding. A few months later, she delivers a baby girl while on the toilet.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: A twenty-two year old, who drops over forty pounds, is shocked to learn that she is carrying a full term baby.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in the Back Seat
programme.desc: As Melissa arrives at the hospital driveway, she gives birth to an unexpected baby in the backseat.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Holiday Food Poisoning
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, paramedics rush Anna to the hospital for what she believes is food poisoning, only to discover she's in labour, 41 weeks pregnant and didn't know it.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in My Sweatpants
programme.desc: Emily fears her appendix has burst and her mother rushes her to the emergency room, but before Emily can get out of the back seat, something slides down the leg of her pants.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Scared Cyst-Less
