programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Lump Overboard
programme.desc: Audrey has a severe condition that leaves her with painful bumps on every inch of her body. An embarrassing armpit growth affects former marine Matt's self-esteem. Jaclyn has a lemon-sized bump on the back of her head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: The Enormous Nose Nodules
programme.desc: Roger's case of rhinophyma is so extreme that he has difficulty breathing. The small, evenly spaced bumps all over Natalie's body are interfering with her life. Virginia thinks the equally sized lumps on her arms make her look like a football player.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: When Skin Goes Wrong: People Like Pus
programme.desc: Amanda undergoes surgery for a lipoma, and Gary has lipomas all over his arm. A procedure on some cysts causes flying debris. A patient struggles with abscesses. Maressa has developed a grey lump on her face. Joanne tried to remove her head cyst herself.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Shame of Water
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Murr and Sal find scandalous diary entries written by their 'daughters', and then break up with significant others in front of strangers. The loser will find himself in hot water and on shaky ground while waiting tables.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode
programme.desc: The guys hit the virtual nightclub with DJ Marshmello and Edie Falco. Joe sends the guys some bottle service.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Operation Hidden Roof
programme.desc: Featured in this episode are a machete-wielding vigilante in underwear, a swimming pool selfie stick debacle and a hoofed menace. Plus, the NSA interns dispose of an oddly erotic project.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Well...
programme.desc: Learn how the guys create rules for new challenges and which Jokers used to carpool to the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode
programme.desc: The guys hit the virtual nightclub with DJ Marshmello and Edie Falco. Joe sends the guys some bottle service.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Well...
programme.desc: Learn how the guys create rules for new challenges and which Jokers used to carpool to the set.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: White Wolf of Newfoundland
programme.desc: Forrest teams up with a specialist in Newfoundland in search of the White Wolf, a predator that was declared extinct in 1930. They meet with a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf and uncover evidence that suggests the species could be alive.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Tasmanian Tiger Down Under

programme.title: Fixer Upper: School Spirit Spurs Home Search
programme.desc: Baylor alumni look for homecoming house near campus.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pesky Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to Santa Ana to check out an off-market listing. It appears to be in good shape, has a great layout, and with strong comparable sales in the area, this home could be a great buy.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Maze
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina check out a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in their new stomping grounds of Garden Grove, California. Hoping to snatch this property before it hits the market, they arrive to find the house is dirty with a mosquito-infested pool.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infringing Flip
programme.desc: A seller is looking to offload a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in Garden Grove, CA, and asks Tarek and Christina to come have a look. The home already has an open floor plan and a master bedroom, but one of its bedrooms may be illegally permitted.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: When strange additions and design challenges collide, this quick flip turns out to be harder than anticipated.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Better Be Quick
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take out an expensive loan to flip a house in Fountain Valley, CA. A tight timeline pressures them to flip the house quickly.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Back House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a small house in Lakewood, CA, to flip quickly. However, when they discover an unpermitted addition, they are faced with a dilemma of bringing the addition up to code or tearing down the nicest part of the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and contractor Izzy Battres take on a small house in Fullerton, CA. The seemingly easy flip becomes difficult when removing a wall creates a nightmare with the city and an unpermitted laundry room must be moved.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diving Into a Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a large home in Anaheim, California, with some strange additions that could end up costing them thousands of dollars and sacrificing square footage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Far Out Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are lured to North Hollywood, CA, by a 1930s Spanish home. They want to appeal to trendy Los Angeles buyers by preserving the historic architecture, but the home's inconvenient distance causes unexpected issues during renovations.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Stiff Competition
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in the upscale neighborhood of North Tustin, CA, but find competition from other investors. They'll need to act quickly or lose out.

programme.title: House Hunters: Security Concerns in Greater D.C.
programme.desc: Newlyweds disagree on style as they search for their first home near Washington, DC. He wants a huge, impressive home like the ones he dreamed of as a boy in India, but she wants something more lived-in and cozy that won't trigger her many phobias.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Family Life in Florence
programme.desc: A family seeks simplicity in Florence, Italy. She wants something in the city center, while he wants a standalone property in the country.

programme.title: House Hunters: A New Start in Chicago

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Freeway Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home for sale in a historic neighborhood of Anaheim, California. It's well-priced but will need a lot of renovation work to be sure.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Abort Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a promising deal in Long Beach, California. Since the property is currently tenant-occupied, they can't inspect inside the house and their decision to buy will have to be made based on what they can see from the car.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Natural Disaster
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead from their friend and investor, Pete, on a house he's recently purchased. It's situated in an upscale, gated neighbourhood and it's a house Pete can't tackle on his own.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Work and Play in Guanacaste
programme.desc: After selling their bar business, a couple looks to start over in Guanacaste, Costa Rica. They're looking for a place that has an artsy feel, and with their entrepreneurial spirit in mind, they're seeking a home that can also generate a rental income.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Soul Searching in Medellín, Colombia
programme.desc: A young, outgoing tech whiz is burned out from his job in New York and looks to take a sabbatical in Medellin, Columbia. He's looking for an apartment with roommates to save money, but his fixation on cleanliness may prove to be challenging.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Going High or Going Low in Auckland
programme.desc: A South African couple wants to give their toddler a better life and move to Auckland, New Zealand. He wants a place that's close to the beach with a good view and doesn't mind an apartment, but she doesn't like heights and wants a ground-level home.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bed and Breakfast in San Clemente
programme.desc: A couple decides to leave their corporate jobs in Canada and open a bed and breakfast in San Clemente, Ecuador. He wants a place that's beachfront and doesn't mind a fixer-upper project, but she wants something turnkey that's close to amenities.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Beach Life in Ocean Grove
programme.desc: A young couple decides to move back to his native Australia after he survived a near-fatal illness. She wants a large yard for their kids and plenty of room for visiting family, but he wants a fixer-upper project that's near the beach.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Move, Dance and Connect in Mexico
programme.desc: After a health scare, a single woman decides to pursue a passion project in Merida, Mexico. She's looking for a traditional, Colonial-style residence with two bedrooms for visiting family and friends, but her budget expectations may present a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Renting vs. Buying Battle in Paris
programme.desc: A newlywed couple is at odds over buying or renting their first home in Paris, France.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Back to the Charm of Edinburgh, Scotland
programme.desc: A family looks to move from Australia back to her home town in Edinburgh, Scotland. They're looking for a home with plenty of outdoor space for their two kids, but she wants a place with traditional Scottish charm while he wants something more modern.

programme.title: My Big Italian Adventure: 1 Euro Dream Home
programme.desc: Actress Lorraine Bracco buys a 200-year-old Italian home and quickly realizes the challenges of bringing a dilapidated property into the modern age. She enlists her close friends, including actress Angie Harmon, to help her transform the first floor.

programme.title: My Big Italian Adventure: 1 Euro Dream Home
programme.desc: Lorraine takes her renovation to the next level and encounters a potentially devastating setback in her cellar.

programme.title: My Big Italian Adventure: 1 Euro Dream Home

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Stuck in the Mud With You

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy...: Stuck in Middle America

programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Underground Aliens
programme.desc: Rumours of the U. S. military working with aliens in a secret underground base in New Mexico continue to swirl.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Contacts
programme.desc: Unearthly visitations, heavenly messengers, close encounters: accounts of humans interacting with celestial beings have existed since the beginning of mankind.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Monsters
programme.desc: Hindu scripture describes an enormous flying creature called a Garuda that shook the ground when it landed on Earth. It may be possible that this monster was actually an alien aircraft.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Sacred Places
programme.desc: Look at whether man's sacred places are really a product of reverence for Gods, or in fact the result of contact with aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Power Plants
programme.desc: Egyptian hieroglyphs depict the use of light bulbs; Mesopotamian batteries are found.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Star Children
programme.desc: On every continent, there are stories of children who 'stand out' for their strange abilities and advanced knowledge. They are said to have knowledge of things they shouldn't or couldn't know. The Egyptians and Greeks have legends of such children.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Reptilians
programme.desc: The Reptilian alien is a fixture of science-fiction, but ancient myths about reptilian creatures could provide evidence that they are more than just a pop-culture creation. Legends of serpent beings can be found on every continent.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Decoding the Cosmic Egg
programme.desc: A cosmic egg, in which the universe or some primordial being comes into existence by the hatching of an egg, is found in the creation myths of many cultures. Clues to the origin of the cosmic egg may lie in another symbol which resembles our DNA code.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Shiva the Destroyer
programme.desc: Of the millions of Hindu gods, none is more important than Shiva, the great destroyer. Ancient Astronaut theorists suggest this powerful being was the leader of an extraterrestrial faction that came to Earth wielding advanced technology.

programme.title: Snapped: Diana Lovejoy

programme.title: Snapped: Tonya Miller
programme.desc: The discovery of a charred body in the bed of a burning pickup truck ignites a homicide investigation in Atlanta, Georgia.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Jones-Orock
programme.desc: Police in a small Pennsylvania town respond to an eyewitness report of a murder behind a grocery store and find that the victim is no stranger to law enforcement.

programme.title: Snapped: Kayla Nelson
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a devoted father leads Arkansas police to a shocking crime scene, the search for answers reveals gang threats, and a killer that's willing to go to great lengths to escape justice.

programme.title: The Real Murders of Orange County: The King of Orange County
programme.desc: The larger-than-life owner of a strip club empire is mowed down with a machine gun before the gates of his Orange County estate. The secrecy surrounding the clubs and their employees makes the case extremely challenging for investigators.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Mansion Massacre
programme.desc: When a quadruple homicide is discovered in the ashes of a D.C. mansion fire, a small piece of evidence points to a monster with a grudge, a violent past, and a long rap sheet. A nationwide manhunt ensues to finally bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Imposter Injustice
programme.desc: After a beloved family man is murdered in a small, Midwest town, cops try to find his missing wife before she meets the same fate. When another homicide occurs, despite a 911 tip with the killer's location, it seems justice may never be served.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Murder Becomes Personal
programme.desc: When Pamela Vitale is found brutally murdered in her home on a California mountainside, detectives are led down a dark path to a killer hiding in plain sight. But even a sentence of life without parole can't guarantee this killer won't walk free.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Danger Lurks Below
programme.desc: Mike Williams vanishes while duck hunting on a Florida lake, in an apparent accident. Nancy Grace traces how the victim's mother launched a campaign to learn the truth that uncovered a tale of greed, betrayal, murder, and injustice.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: A Deadly Search for Love
programme.desc: When Utah teen Annie Kasprzak is brutally murdered, one solid lead after another evaporates in a haze of rumors and lies. After a suspect is finally in custody, Annie's family fights to make sure this killer's sentencing is just.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: Michelle Mockbee is beaten to death at the Kentucky warehouse where she works, and cops realize the killer is likely a co-worker. They must eliminate employees one-by-one until the suspect is finally revealed, along with an outrageous motive.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Winkler
programme.desc: Desperate to find her way out of financial crisis and escape a troubled marriage, this wholesome preacher's wife exchanged virtue for the ultimate vice.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Charles Cullen

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Kristen Gilbert
programme.desc: Police believe nurse Kristen Gilbert may have committed up to 60 murders at a hospital in Massachusetts. Some say an affair drove Gilbert to murder while others think her narcissism caused the death of these innocent patients.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: The Hollywood Ripper
programme.desc: A killer escapes his past and finds a new hunting ground in a city of dreamers. In 2019, after a decade long hunt across four police departments, Michael Gargiulo, now known as The Hollywood Ripper, faces trial for brutally murdering 3 young women.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Aileen Wuornos

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Ted Bundy

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Mutant Sewer Stalker
programme.desc: Surveillance footage captures an unidentified creature emerging and slithering from underground sewer pipes, leaving some to suspect a mutant creature has morphed beneath the city streets; using the latest cutting-edge tech, experts investigate.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Satellites spot strange spiral markings in the remote African desert. A weird deadly black blob is threatening the Florida Keys. Something massive found deep beneath the ice of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters at Fort Madness
programme.desc: Alien monoliths haunting the coast of England. An obliterated jungle pointing to a brutal narco gold rush. Evidence of a strange blood-red creature emerging from the deep.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Right Back
programme.desc: When Alicia DeBolt goes missing, a helpful neighbor points the finger at an older kid she's been hanging out with. When police discover a string of texts on her cell phone, the net closes in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Girl in the Photo
programme.desc: After a teenage house party spirals out of control, a shocking photo goes viral around the local schools. A vicious campaign of cyber bullying ensues that drives an innocent girl to take desperate action.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Swipe Right for Murder
programme.desc: When Ashley Pegram goes missing after meeting a man through a dating app, the race to find her focuses on her internet admirer. Detectives soon discover she is caught up in a nightmarish trap set by an online predator with murder on his mind.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: A mother’s intuition that something is wrong with her daughter leads Los Angeles police to a house of horrors. Inside, they found Iana Kasian, 30, brutally murdered. Where the trail of blood led them could be the subject of a movie script or horror novel.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: '48 Hours' explores a tale of tragedy to triumph and how a killer's heart saved the life of a dying woman in need of a transplant.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Buried Dreams
programme.desc: In 2007 in Bethany, Oklahoma, a young pregnant woman goes missing. Police desperately try to retrace her last steps, and unearth more than just the secrets she harbored.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: While I Was Gone
programme.desc: Michele Ward was always glad that her husband, Richard Daniel Starrett, didn't mind her frequent trips to visit her parents. She never guessed that he sent her away because his sick perversion was getting harder and harder to hide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: '48 Hours' explores a tale of tragedy to triumph and how a killer's heart saved the life of a dying woman in need of a transplant.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Buried Dreams
programme.desc: In 2007 in Bethany, Oklahoma, a young pregnant woman goes missing. Police desperately try to retrace her last steps, and unearth more than just the secrets she harbored.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Shape of a Killer
programme.desc: After three similar murders, Austin, Texas police began to wonder if a serial killer was on the loose. A man out for a late night walk testing a thermal imaging nightscope might have captured images of the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Side Business
programme.desc: When the body of a professor and family man is discovered in the office of a used car dealership, Detective Postiglione solves the puzzle after recalling a specific clue that gave the killer he spots, the window of opportunity.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Texts and Threats
programme.desc: After losing his dream girl to an older guy, Seath Jackson launches into a bitter social media war with his ex and her new man. Soon after, Seath disappears. Detectives work to find out if this is a runaway case or something more serious.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: November 2014, Tiffanie Adams' body is found in a field. A small town sheriff must retrace the expectant mom's steps to catch a cold blooded killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Mother Gone Missing
programme.desc: February, 2009: 32 year-old Becky Brosnan has disappeared. A Myspace message says she's left 'to find herself,' but everyone says Becky wouldn't abandon her children. Now, detectives must piece together Becky's life to uncover what happened to her.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Watch
programme.desc: These Deadly Women get their kicks from the suffering of others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Above the Law
programme.desc: For some, high social status is a license to kill. Trusted by the community, these ladies are beyond suspicion as the bodies pile up. No matter how heinous their crimes, these women get away with murder so easily; they assume they're entitled to do it.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Souls of Stone
programme.desc: Selfish women will sometimes sell their souls to the devil to get what they want. A scorned lover weaves a web of lies, a teenage Goth orders a reign of terror, and a gold-digger buries secrets in her basement.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death of a Salesman
programme.desc: John Parker marries Judy, a nice girl from the wrong side of the tracks. John uses his wealth and status to keep his new wife happy. But Judy's rumored romantic entanglements with a string of John's employees prove to be too much for John to bear.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Not in Kansas Anymore
programme.desc: Kelly and Punkie are teenagers in love. They marry almost as soon as the law will allow, and plan to raise children in rural Kansas. But things take a deadly turn when they befriend Tammy and Jerry, a sexually adventurous couple with a need for speed.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Down in Deep Creek, Maryland
programme.desc: A family of six looks for a vacation home on Deep Creek Lake in Maryland. They find the lakefront property of their dreams but it's in need of some major renovations.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Spruce Up on Alabama's Smith Lake
programme.desc: College sweethearts are ready to find a vacation home for their family on Alabama's Smith Lake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Travel to Los Angeles, where the weather is warm and the local food is fantastic.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Memphis
programme.desc: From sweet deals on steak dinners at The Butchershop, to the guilty pleasure of indulgent surf and turf at Iris, Memphis is home to some of the best food you'll ever eat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tahiti
programme.desc: From a Polynesian twist on ceviche to freshwater shrimp coated in a sweet, coconut-curry sauce, Andrew sets sail on a culinary voyage through the signature dishes of Tahiti.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Iowa
programme.desc: Andrew discovers a world of unexpected flavors in the middle of America's heartland when he makes a visit to Iowa! From head cheese and pickled onion to a Sudanese stew, Andrew finds out that there's a lot more than meat and potatoes on the table in Iowa!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew visits Seattle where the food scene is a contrast of high tech sophistication and rugged simplicity.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Houston, TX
programme.desc: Casey two-steps down to Houston, Texas, for some tex-mex tastiness, including a colossal 22-ounce chicken-fried steak and the ultimate spicy challenge: a burger topped with seven of the world's hottest chile peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head

programme.title: Oddbods: Oddbeard's Curse

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Knocked Out/ Not Without My Cereal

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Those Who Camp, Do/ Dog Gone
programme.desc: Brad decides to tag along when Kick vows to spend a night in the untamed wilderness and make it out alive. Later, Kick must track down a ferocious devil dog before Mrs. Chicarelly gets home and gets him grounded for life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kickasaurus Wrecks/ Battle for the 'Snax
programme.desc: Kick is forced into a shrimp costume after being hired to perform during the halftime show for a local football team. Gunther's parents are forced to sell their beloved restaurant and move back to the old country unless Kick can help them get customers.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Gym Dandy/ Detained
programme.desc: Kick tries out for the school's sports teams, but causes chaos when he has trouble following Coach Sternbeck's rules. Then, Kick must team up with some unlikely allies to bring down the new Vice Principal and escape detention.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Poll Position/ Jock Wilder's Nature Camp
programme.desc: Kendall runs for class president in order to make Kick's life miserable. So, he decides to get Wacky and Jackie elected instead, but their agenda might even be worse. Kick decides to make Jock Wilder's Nature camp more awesome.

programme.title: Bones: The Memories in the Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When the Jeffersonian team identifies the remains of a woman found in a paintball field, they discover two missing-persons reports in her file. Booth and Sweets interrogate the victim's husband and learn that she suffered from amnesia.

programme.title: Martin: Scrooge

programme.title: Movie: On the 12th Date of Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers vying for the same promotion are tasked with creating a 12 Days of Christmas scavenger hunt to promote the premiere of a new hotel.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas with the Darlings
programme.desc: When an assistant gives her final notice, she is drawn into helping the charming, younger brother of her wealthy boss as he looks after his orphaned nieces and nephew through Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cure
programme.desc: An emergency room doctor returns home for Christmas and reunites with old friends and family and is asked to take over her dad's old practice. The doctor must now choose between a new life and an old one.

programme.title: Movie: A Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa grants a wish for a woman and she gets a chance to prove herself to her boss. Santa's wish only gives her 48 hours and as the clock ticks down, she channels the Christmas magic and speaks her mind all on her own.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Land
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a Christmas tree farm from her late grandmother, she decides the sensible thing to do is sell it. However, once she revisits the farm, she falls in love with the townspeople and the farm.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Homestead
programme.desc: A famous actress heads to a Christmas-obsessed town to film a movie, and is thrown for a loop when a romance brews between her and a local inn keeper, who's a single dad. As she gets a taste of small-town life, she discovers the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Sleigh Bells Ring

programme.title: Movie: Chateau Christmas
programme.desc: A world-famous pianist returns The Chateau at Christmas to spend the holiday with her family and rediscover her passion for music.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses
programme.desc: A woman is hired to decorate an estate building a few weeks before Christmas. While there, she works to break down the wall between her and the business owner, all while keeping the holiday spirit alive.

programme.title: The Office

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Affair
programme.desc: Roland and Moira attend a regional town councilors conference. Johnny and Jocelyn think that their spouses are keeping secrets from them. David and Patrick prepare the store for opening.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Sebastien Raine
programme.desc: David’s photographer ex-boyfriend arrives in town to do a photo series on Moira.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Stop Saying Lice!
programme.desc: Johnny tries to avoid the spread of lice in the motel; Moira tries to get out of having a flower garden named after her.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Friends and Family

programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie celebrate their first fully booked motel; David goes on a date with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Dead Guy in Room 4

programme.title: Movie: Forever Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic reality TV producer finds herself falling for her mysterious new star.

programme.title: Movie: The Spirit of Christmas
programme.desc: An ambitious lawyer heads to Vermont to broker the sale of an old inn. She learns it is haunted by a man who died 95 years ago. He takes human form every year exactly twelve days before Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: A Date by Christmas Eve
programme.desc: When a dating app gives her magical powers, a young woman must set things right by Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Fatal Fence Feud
programme.desc: Even after Lonnie Paul Tracey erected a giant barricade between him and his neighbor Tony Davis, no one ever dreamed their ongoing arguments would escalate to murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl
programme.desc: When a mother and recovering addict is stabbed while standing up to the neighborhood bully, grainy video and unreliable witnesses stand in the way of investigators determining who was holding the knife that killed her.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: When Jason Horsley is gunned down in front of his home, investigators discover evidence of a neighbor’s deadly plotting, but it would take six years to track the killer down.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Promised Land
programme.desc: Parker expands to a second cut and puts his trust in a rookie foreman. Tony battles the cursed cut. Rick fires up his plant on rich ground. Greenhorn Fred Lewis calls in a mining legend. The miners reveal their secrets for striking it rich gold mining.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Fast and The Furious
programme.desc: Parker's new strategy to build a war chest creates an engineering challenge, igniting a flare up with his foremen. Rick pulls in his first gold of the season. Fred calls in reinforcements.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Breaking the Piggy Bank
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Parker's crew works double-time hoping for a big payoff while Tony gambles on a hidden strip of paydirt. Later, Rick struggles to keep his small crew working.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Six men risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Big Bowl Bet
programme.desc: After a great start, thick clay in the pay dirt clogs the sluice, forcing Dave Turin and his crew to quickly troubleshoot the land and get the operation back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Six men risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Vanishing Gold
programme.desc: Tensions and suspicions mount when the crew is failing to see the gold they know they should be capturing. A deeper look in the gold room leads to an incredible revelation that eases the team's fears and gets them back on track.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: As gold prices spike to record highs and the cost of fuel plummets, Parker, Rick and Tony race to take advantage of the perfect conditions. But after the worldwide lockdown delayed the start of the season, there's less time than ever to cash in.

programme.title: Impossible Croc Rescue
programme.desc: A giant crocodile whose neck is trapped in a small motorcycle tire has captured the world's attention. Animal expert Forrest Galante travels to Indonesia to take on the ultimate challenge of saving its life.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: 2020 World Championship: Shotgun Round Group A
programme.desc: Join 48 of the world's best professional anglers as they compete in fishing tournaments.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Fresh to Market
programme.desc: Drew searches for 'fresh to market' items, pieces that dealers haven't seen yet. His hunt takes him to the Cotswolds for a stash of Indian and Afghan treasures and finally to an old factory filled with industrial objects never seen by any dealer.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Max Hits
programme.desc: Drew scores a huge farmhouse table from a wholesaler in Exeter, then heads to North London to visit one of his best-kept secrets before taking off for Herefordshire to a busy antiques center where he spies an early Victorian whatnot.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: New Territory
programme.desc: Drew discovers a wealth of oddities in a country pub in Devon, then heads to Hastings where he finds some of the best vintage tools he's ever seen. He finally visits West Sussex, where a rare and coveted stained-glass window design awaits.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Spray Insulation Technician
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty with a team of airport runway painters, examines dirty diapers for bad smells and then teams up with a group of spray insulation technicians that get dirty to keep our houses warm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Steel Mill Worker
programme.desc: Mike works with a river barge demolition team then melts down the scrap steel into molten metal.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wetland Warrior
programme.desc: Mike travels to Texas to work as a stand-in fugitive while attempting to outsmart a team of bloodhounds and evade being captured. Then he heads to the Florida Everglades to help combat non-native, invasive species in the marshlands.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Diaper Cleaner
programme.desc: Mike journeys to Queen Creek, Arizona to press olives into oil and then heads to Sacramento, California to clean dirty diapers.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Wedding Bells Are Ringing
programme.desc: Now four months into their engagement, Whitney and Chase are no closer to living together, but wedding plans need to be made. During a mountain getaway, Whitney and Buddy test their new boundaries.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney's Long-Distance Relationship
programme.desc: Agonizing over his blow up with Whitney, Buddy seeks her out to apologize but scares her with the intensity of his reaction. When Whitney visits Chase in Wilmington, North Carolina, for the weekend, he gives her an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: A Thrilla in Manila
programme.desc: A shocking secret about Royal and Angenette's relationship surfaces just as the family heads to the Philippines for their wedding. Meanwhile, in the Dominican Republic, Nicole braces herself for Lidia's reaction when her new boyfriend comes to visit.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Loose Lips Sink Ships
programme.desc: As the family Chantel prepares for the Philippines wedding, Chantel and Pedro try to get to the bottom of Royal and Angenette's trust issues, and it leads to an explosive confrontation. Nicole hopes introducing Alejandro to her friends will go smoothly.

programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene

programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring

programme.desc: The casino staffers are busy making holiday plans, except Mike, who begins to doubt his place in Vegas, as well as in his friends' lives. A modern day Scrooge, Sam invites a client to come to the casino for the holidays.

programme.title: Las Vegas: I Could Eat a Horse
programme.desc: Danny and Mike head to Wyoming to buy a horse that Cooper wants to add to his ranch but this isn't as easy as they thought. Back at the casino, Delinda tries to find a new chef for the restaurant.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 3 Babies, 100 Guns and a Fat Chick
programme.desc: When a fugitive arrives at the Montecito, FBI agents and bounty hunters hope to make a capture. Mike, Danny and Cooper step in, and end up fighting for their lives. Also, Piper throws a post-New Year's Eve party.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Secrets, Lies and Lamaze
programme.desc: Piper gets himself in trouble with the gaming commission, but Cooper bails her out to the tune of $1-million, making the staffers suspicious of his actions. Sam and manicurist Polly get caught speeding and sentenced to traffic school.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast
programme.desc: Sam helps her 'whales' destroy any evidence that they went to a strip club. Meanwhile, Mike and Piper try to lure a hot new bartender to work at the Montecito. Elsewhere, Cooper challenges Danny to find ways to bring in more clientele.

programme.title: Las Vegas: 2 on 2
programme.desc: Piper's skills are put to the test when she is nominated for the 'Concierge of the Year' award. Meanwhile, Danny and Mike find themselves in over their heads upon entering a 2 on 2-basketball competition.

programme.title: Las Vegas: Win, Place, Bingo
programme.desc: Cooper, Danny and Mike are suspicious of a guy named Pete Skinner who is betting on horses and has a seemingly perfect winning streak. Meanwhile, Sam's 'whale' brings his grandmother 'Robby' with him to the casino.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Solutions
programme.desc: Join Terry Bradshaw and his family as they navigate life.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Problems
programme.desc: Terry’s eldest daughter Rachel’s new real estate career needs help, Lacey’s husband doesn’t want to move to Texas and Erin has been keeping a secret from him about a recent change to her appearance.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Terry Is in a Jam
programme.desc: The Bradshaw clan travels to Dallas as Terry is hosting (and driving in) the big Monster Jam truck rally. When Terry suffers from a panic attack, an old sibling rivalry is forced to come to a head.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Mr. Wrong
programme.desc: Rachel is with the wrong guy and everyone in the family can see it but her. While Terry and Zurie get payback on Tammy after years of her pranks, Lacey and Noah consider moving back to Texas to be closer to family.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Terry is invited to Washington D.C. to sing with Rob Gronkowski at the USO. While he brings his family along to meet the troops, Rachel gets her mojo back and falls for a marine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Flavor
programme.desc: Guy travels the South to try the unique flavours and authentic favourites from the region.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sauced and Spiced
programme.desc: Guy heads to Tennessee for a traditional Mediterranean lamb dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hitting the Grill
programme.desc: Guy samples foods straight off the grill, including a burger joint in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tasty Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into dishes steeped in tasty tradition. In Seattle, a funky spot makes their name with scratch-made Russian piroshki. A tucked-away joint in Kona serves up a bite of culture with their authentic Hawaiian cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Dinner and Dessert That Delivers
programme.desc: Guy and his family combine their love of cooking at home and great restaurant food for some takeout. Four DDD alums send ingredients for their best recipes then join Guy and his son via video chat to guide them through the recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ultimate Turkey Fest
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's gobbling up Thanksgiving with an hour of talking turkey. From Boston to California to Wisconsin to Florida, he's digging into everything from the traditional dinner to turducken and turkey-shaped bread loaves.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pierogis, Pork and Pizza
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diving into all kinds of off-the-hook flavors on this trip. In Hollywood, Fla., a sandwich shop servin' up a terrific taste of Peru. A pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin', Chillin' and Huli Huli Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is heading to unique grills on the mainland. The first stop is a husband a wife duo serving up classic Americana with a 21st century twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Trottin' Out the Turkey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checkin' out Flavortown's all-time turkey-centric spots. At a Boston diner, Guy reminisces about the Thanksgiving plate he had in 2007. Then, in New Orleans, traditional turkey gets the French Quarter flair.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, Calif., a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, Mich., the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pierogis, Pork and Pizza
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diving into all kinds of off-the-hook flavors on this trip. In Hollywood, Fla., a sandwich shop servin' up a terrific taste of Peru. A pierogi palace in Philadelphia giving a fresh take on Polish specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grillin', Chillin' and Huli Huli Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is heading to unique grills on the mainland. The first stop is a husband a wife duo serving up classic Americana with a 21st century twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal BBQ
programme.desc: Guy seeks out authentic barbecue restaurants around the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels from the east coast to the southwest in search of regional specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Memphis Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: While in Memphis, Guy samples pulled pork sandwiches and barbecue spaghetti.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hunts down some seriously good food with visits to Baltimore, Minnesota, and Mississippi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Party
programme.desc: Guy's roundin' up the ultimate pizza party all over the nation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Back to the Beginning
programme.desc: Get ready to open the vault for the hour that started it all, the very first Triple-D episode ever. Only this time, it's reloaded with plenty of extras from Guy himself, about his original trip through Flavortown.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
