programme.title: Martina's Table: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With her entire family home for Thanksgiving, country music superstar Martina McBride shares some of her favourite recipes inspired by her Kansas roots. Her holiday menu includes sausage, cherry and cornbread stuffing and candied pecans.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Thankful For Family
programme.desc: When it comes to Thanksgiving Valerie really knows how to bring the people she loves together. She and Tom host both of their families for a Thanksgiving feast to remember.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Turkey Day Tricks
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts give away their best Turkey Day tricks and recipes including Geoffrey Zakarian's bone-in turkey breast with lemon caper sauce.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Family and Friends Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Giada hosts a festive Thanksgiving for family and friends. The guests enjoy a menu of braised turkey braciole, bacon stuffing with radicchio and chestnuts, Brussel sprouts agrodolce and parmesan apple pie.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Giada's Turkey Day Feast
programme.desc: Giada is ready to pull off a seamless, stress-free Thanksgiving with feast plans beginning three days in advance. Her make-ahead menu features lemon and pea alfredo, sweet and savory kale salad, prosciutto-wrapped turkey and mascarpone cannoli cheesecake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Perfect as Pie
programme.desc: Ree Drummond proves that the pie's the limit with four irresistibly easy pie recipes. She makes a drunken pecan pie, a coconut cream pie with shortcuts, a cranberry and cherry cobbler pie and a super fast cast iron blueberry and nectarine galette.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Thanksgiving Shortcuts
programme.desc: Ree is sneaking a few store-bought shortcuts into her make-ahead Thanksgiving feast. First is her epic make ahead Thanksgiving turkey, which is cooked and portioned in advance. She makes doctored up dressing and gussied up gravy to go alongside it.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Turkey Day To-Do List
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts get ready for the big turkey day with a to-do list. Geoffrey Zakarian makes his picture perfect whole roasted turkey with sumac, lemon and thyme, plus gravy.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Dishes That Keep Giving
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes the most of a free day by preparing dishes that make perfect leftovers. First up is chicken pot pie, and she makes plenty of cheesy country ham grit balls with spicy mayo and some pan-roasted sage and butternut squash.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Giving Thanks and Giving Back
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, return to Nashville Food Project, a local nonprofit that farms and feeds Nashville's local communities, to use fall crops from the community garden in a meal for the staff and farmers.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Turkey Day Tournament
programme.desc: The first round has a Thanksgiving feast to prepare and in the next round, the chefs use leftovers to create something special, an upscale dinner. Included in this episode is the fall edition of Grocery Bowl.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Thanksgiving in Flavortown
programme.desc: Four chefs are fixin' for a Thanksgiving in Flavortown. First, they must make a regional Thanksgiving dinner using only seven pounds of ingredients. Next, the chefs have only 15 minutes to whip up a party plate for unexpected houseguests.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Thanksgiving Grocery Trot
programme.desc: Four chefs get their basters ready for this Thanksgiving episode. The chefs find autumn staples, which they must incorporate to their inventive fall dishes.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Shepwrecked
programme.desc: Kathryn struggles with supervised visitation with her children as Craig judges Thomas' parenting style. However, while Craig meddles in the affairs of his friends, his life with Naomie is slowly starting to fall apart.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Craig of All Trades, Master of None
programme.desc: Cameran turns to the supernatural in hopes of finding her life's purpose, while Thomas takes a leap of faith by asking Landon out on a date. Naomie reaches her boiling point when she learns of Craig's latest endeavor.

programme.title: Southern Charm: To Liver and Die in Charleston
programme.desc: After going to the doctor, Shep receives some shocking news about his health, causing him to take a step back from his party-boy ways. Love is in the air as Austen and Chelsea deepen their romantic bond.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Fowl Play
programme.desc: As Kathryn contemplates a reunion with the father of her children, Patricia continues to push Landon and Thomas closer together. Craig and Naomie attempt to reconcile after their latest blow up, and Shep plans a hunting getaway for the group.

programme.desc: Craig and Naomie visit a therapist to help save their increasingly rocky relationship while Austen and Chelsea continue to grow closer. But when Shep runs into Austen and Landon at a bar, he's convinced there's more going on between them.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Guess Who's Coming to Lunch

programme.title: Southern Charm: The Hangover

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Aileen Wuornos

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Ted Bundy

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sideshow Bob's Last Gleaming

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: How It's Made: Car Tires; Silk; Art Conservation; Scuba Tanks
programme.desc: Learn how car tires, silk, art conservation and scuba tanks are made.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Keeping Shipping Alive During a Pandemic
programme.desc: Tracking and managing the shipping of everything from produce to personal protective equipment is no small job. Ride along as Darieth Chisolm checks out how one company uses GPS and yard management systems to keep distributors and manufacturers supplied.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Memphis Blues
programme.desc: In July of 2010, NBA star and family man Lorenzen Wright goes missing outside of Memphis, TN. When his dead body is discovered in the woods, investigators find that this case is far from a slam dunk.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Where Is Baby DeOrr?
programme.desc: A young couple enjoys an impromptu camping trip in Leadore, Idaho, until their 2-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators and private detectives work around the clock to find the missing boy, only to point the finger back at the parents.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Unicorn Killer
programme.desc: A Philadelphia woman disappears in the fall of 1977. Later, police come to learn the terrifying truth about her whereabouts, but struggle to locate and bring in her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Manhunt
programme.desc: When loving couple Gary and Linda Haas fail to reach their vacation campsite, New Mexico State Police are called in to investigate. With no forensic evidence and no witnesses, all they can do is scour CCTV footage for clues to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Sierra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Sierra LaMar leaves for school like any other day, only to disappear without a trace. Surveillance footage helps reveal if she is just another typical runaway or if something a lot worse happens to Sierra.

programme.title: See No Evil: Where's Mom?
programme.desc: Shirley Shell is a loving wife and the dedicated mother of three children and two grandchildren. But on June 3rd, 2007, Shirley is found brutally murdered at home in Edmond, Oklahoma. The rush is on to search security footage to help hunt down the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a 14-year-old girl vanishes without a trace on her way to school. Her parents have no idea where she could be. Investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage, but are unsure if they will find her before its too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Night Shift
programme.desc: 18-year-old Kyle Farishian is working the late shift at a 7-Eleven on Halloween when he is brutally attacked by a masked assailant. With no physical evidence, detectives scrutinize the convenience store's surveillance footage for any clues.

programme.title: The Last 24: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: When Diane Holik's body is discovered in her Texas home, detectives are faced with one of the most pristine crime scenes they've ever encountered. They unearth multiple suspects, but only the victim's reconstructed timeline can identify the killer.

programme.title: The Last 24: Unforgivable Sin
programme.desc: Popular newlyweds Rick and Gail Brink are shot execution-style in their Michigan home. But it will take 25 years before investigators uncover a flaw in the timeline that convinces them of the killer's guilt.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Shanann Watts and her two daughters went missing. Her husband Chris was on television, pleading for their return. Then their bodies were found at the oil site where he worked.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Robert Blake
programme.desc: He was a famous Hollywood actor. She was his wife. Some said she was also a con artist. Then Bonny Lee Bakley was found murdered in their car.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Mexico With My Kids
programme.desc: In 2009, Valerie Castellano robbed a bank in rural Indiana and fled with her children and girlfriend to Mexico.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Underground
programme.desc: Toby Young escaped to Mexico through drug tunnels and learned the true cost of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best grilled dishes in restaurants across America. He's hanging out in the kitchens of fire-loving chefs to learn everything there is to know about applying heat and smoke for the tastiest chicken, beef, and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Stage! Facing Aiger!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The One that Didn't Get Away!
programme.desc: What starts as an ordinary fishing expedition turns into a much bigger adventure than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Trading Chips / Mini Noodle Burger Max
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show
programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Times Circle/ Super Gramma
programme.desc: Tilly and Remy put on a sidewalk play while Cricket and Bill meet their favorite costumed superheroes. Cricket and Tilly try to keep Gramma at home while she recovers from eye surgery.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Quiet Please/ Chipwrecked
programme.desc: When the Greens visit the library, the librarian threatens to throw them out if they make a sound. Chip Whistler attempts to make Cricket lose his job by running Big Coffee out of business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.desc: Daily NBA discussion featuring the latest news and stories with a panel of NBA analysts and current players.
